series.curator_notes: Film and TV series Hörspiele based on Disney/Pixar's Cars franchise. Cars on the Road (01-02) are numbered TV series episodes. Film Hörspiele are complete movie adaptations with chapter markers but no episode numbers.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns:
All 6 albums are German-language Disney/Pixar audio dramas (Hörspiele) matching the Cars franchise:
- 2 "Cars on the Road" episodes (Ep 1 & 2 from the TV series)
- The 3 feature films: Cars, Cars 2, Cars 3 - Evolution
- 1 "Cars Toon" album (Hook's unbelievable stories)

All are from Walt Disney Records with appropriate chapter-based track listings.
No gaps in the numbered episodes (1-2 of Cars on the Road).
No issues found - curation is correct.
